title: Walk-in Drive Medical Officer at Narayana Health South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Medical Officer at Narayana Health South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
We at Narayana Health South Asia Partners are looking for an experienced Medical Officer based out of Mysuru. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Narayana Health South Asia Partners:
Narayana Health South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in CPT Codes

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Narayana Health South Asia Partners!
